name: AI-Research-SKILLs
description: Comprehensive open-source library of 85 AI research and engineering skills across 21 categories (model architecture, fine-tuning, post-training, distributed training, RAG, agents, multimodal, safety, and more) for any AI coding agent. Installable via npx for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, and others. Maintained by Orchestra Research.

findings_summary.notes: Legitimate organization-backed skill library maintained by Orchestra Research. Contains 85 markdown-based skills installable via npx interactive CLI. MIT licensed. Active development with 30 commits since Nov 2025, 7 contributors, 315 forks, 3936 stars. No SECURITY.md present (minor deduction). Installer.js clones repo to ~/.orchestra/skills and creates symlinks to agent config dirs - standard and transparent behavior. No executable server components, no hardcoded credentials, no dangerous shell patterns found. Relatively new repo but well-structured with CI/CD and npm publishing pipeline.
